MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DOUGLAS SYKES , AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF TIFFANY CHOU's Motion To Stay Proceedings

is DENIED. According to the Notice of Motion, moving party seeks to stay these proceedings "until completion of the jury trial scheduled for November 10, 2025, in the related Unlawful Detainer case." This request is not supported by Points and Authorities, which requests stay in conjunction with a different action, CGC-25-677947.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
